Mentions Timeline (4 articles)
3307-02-12
Empire and Marlinists Prepare for Galactic Summit
Delegations have been formed by The Empire and the Marlinist Colonies to take part in the forthcoming diplomatic conference.
3302-10-27
Galactic News Federation Blockades Maia A 3 a
A Farragut-class Battlecruiser blockaded Maia A 3 a near Professor Ishmael Palin's research base, redirecting pilots who strayed too close. Alliance Prime Minister Edmund Mahon called it "an egregious act of oppression" and Emperor Arissa Lavigny-Duval demanded the Federation curtail restrictions on Palin's freedoms.
3302-10-01
Galactic News Acrimony on Achenar
An anonymous source revealed that the scandal surrounding former senator Kahina Tijani Loren has awoken latent animosity within the Imperial powerbase, bringing attention to Admiral Denton Patreus, Princess Aisling Duval, and Emperor Arissa Lavigny-Duval.
3301-10-21
The Emperor Denounces Emperor's Dawn
